query: latest clinical guidelines for managing long COVID symptoms in adults

url_quality_notes.https://www.cdc.gov/long-covid/hcp/clini: Excellent: complete content, authority_score=1.0, query_relevance_score=1.0, dated 2026-03-09. Correctly ranked #1.
url_quality_notes.https://www.uptodate.com/contents/covid-: Critical failure: scrape returned only 'Loading' placeholder, word_count=3, no content extracted. Should not appear in results or should be last.
url_quality_notes.https://www.acponline.org/clinical-infor: Tangential: resource listing page, not actual guidelines. query_relevance_score=0.6, no publication date, no treatment algorithms.
url_quality_notes.https://www.idsociety.org/practice-guide: Off-topic: covers acute COVID-19 treatment, not long COVID. query_relevance_score=0.1. Tables lost as images.
url_quality_notes.https://publications.ersnet.org/content/: Highly relevant long COVID guideline (query_relevance_score=0.9, dated 2026-03-05) but only abstract scraped; full text is PDF-only. Should rank #2 if full text were extracted.

query: what customs duty-free allowances and import restrictions apply to US citizens entering Japan - alcohol, tobacco, currency declaration thresholds, and prohibited or restricted items

url_quality_notes.https://www.cbp.gov/travel/international: Completely irrelevant to Japan customs; covers US CBP rules for returning residents. query_relevance_score=0.0, answers_query=false.
url_quality_notes.https://www.denver.us.emb-japan.go.jp/it: Official Japanese consulate page with duty-free allowances, tobacco, medication rules; missing currency declaration thresholds. authority_score=0.95, relevance=0.85.
url_quality_notes.https://www.jal.co.jp/jp/en/inter/airpor: Full coverage of all query aspects (alcohol, tobacco, currency ¥1,000,000, prohibited items). query_relevance_score=1.0, authority_score=0.9. Missing publication_date.
url_quality_notes.https://www.facebook.com/GulfNews.UAE/po: Severely truncated to 27 words; irrelevant to Japan customs; query_relevance_score=0.0. Should not appear in results.
url_quality_notes.https://www.roafly.com/blog/japan-airpor: Blog post with good coverage of duty-free, medications, and prohibited items; authority_score=0.4 with no official citations. Useful as supplementary source.

query: evidence based treatment options for adult ADHD management

url_quality_notes.https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PM: Excellent systematic review with full pharmacological, behavioral, and neurostimulation coverage; scrape_score=0.20 due to boilerplate but content_completeness=complete with 3 tables and 25 headings preserved.
url_quality_notes.https://add.org/adhd-therapies/: Highly relevant (0.95) with good therapy coverage but authority=0.75 (blog post, no individual author credentials) and scrape_score=0.40 with missing H1 and significant boilerplate.
url_quality_notes.https://www.adhdevidence.org/blog/eviden: Tangential (relevance=0.4, coverage_level='tangential') — describes a database platform rather than providing treatment recommendations; should be demoted below all adult-specific sources.
url_quality_notes.https://www.cdc.gov/adhd/treatment/index: Completely irrelevant to adult ADHD (relevance=0.1, coverage_level='none') — page exclusively covers child/adolescent treatment; should not appear in results for an adult-focused query.
url_quality_notes.https://health.ucdavis.edu/mind-institut: Highly relevant (0.95) and authoritative (0.95) with explicit adult ADHD sections, but only partial coverage (missing pharmacological options) and scrape_score=0.40 due to minor typo in link title.
